title: Megalastrum heydei

Megalastrum heydei is classified in the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, and order Polypodiales. This species is a type of epiphytic fern, growing on other plants for support. Megalastrum heydei is a relatively rare and understudied species, with limited information available on its classification and distribution.
